cases.name: acronyms
cases.input: Write 3 ADRs; one ADR per choice. 5 hr/wk on K8s and IaC; review JDs, one JD, PR #148.
cases.cleaned: Write 3 architecture decision records; one architecture decision record per choice. 5 hours per week on Kubernetes and infrastructure as code; review job descriptions, one job description, pull request 148.
chunks: Write 3 architecture decision records; one architecture decision record per choice. 5 hours per week on Kubernetes and infrastructure as code; review job descriptions, one job description, pull request 148.

cases.name: arrows-and-compare

chunks: a to b and c, x at most 5, y at least 2, 3 times 4, 50 percent.

cases.name: blockquote-and-bullets

> A quoted line
> another

- first bullet
* star bullet
  - indented dash

another.

first bullet.
star bullet.
indented dash.

another.

first bullet.
star bullet.
indented dash.

---
After

code line stays? fence line goes.

chunks: This bold and also bold and ital and ital and midstar and snake_case_word stay sane.

entities-and-middot

chunks: A . B . C D and E F.
